case_title: COUGHLIN, MARRY ATTORNEY AT LAW VS LANDERO, ROGELIO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY COUGHLIN, MARRY ATTORNEY AT LAW AS TO DEFENDANT LANDERO, ROGELIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LANDERO, ROGELIO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COUGHLIN, MARRY ATTORNEY AT LAW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANDERO, ROGELIO $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,390.00, $500.00 PAYABLE TODAY (5/10/93) BY 5:00PM. BALANCE TO BE PAID IN INSTALLMENT AT THE RATE OF $450 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
